categories.intraday: 15-minute intraday roll-ups projected to the daily index

features.name: d_close
features.desc: BTC daily close price (USD).

features.name: d_ret_1
features.desc: One-day simple return.

features.name: d_rsi14
features.desc: Wilder's 14-period Relative Strength Index on daily close. Standard momentum oscillator bounded in [0,100].

features.name: d_macd_hist
features.desc: MACD histogram = MACD line − Signal line. MACD line is EMA12 − EMA26 of close; Signal is EMA9 of MACD.

features.name: d_bb_pos
features.desc: Position of price within a 20-day Bollinger band, normalised so that ±1 corresponds to the band edges.

features.name: d_ma_ratio
features.desc: Ratio of 7-day fast moving average to 25-day slow moving average, minus 1. Positive in trends, near 0 in ranges.

features.name: d_vol
features.desc: 14-day rolling standard deviation of log returns.

features.name: d_range_pct
features.desc: Bar range as a percentage of close price.

features.name: d_vol_z
features.desc: 180-day z-score of trading volume — captures unusual activity regimes.

features.name: w_close
features.desc: Weekly close price; weekly bars are resampled from the daily series.

features.name: w_ret_1
features.desc: One-week return.

features.name: w_rsi14
features.desc: 14-period RSI on weekly close.

features.name: w_macd_hist
features.desc: MACD histogram on weekly close.

features.name: w_bb_pos
features.desc: Bollinger position on weekly close (window length adapted to lookback).

features.name: w_ma_ratio
features.desc: Fast/slow MA ratio on weekly close.

features.name: w_vol
features.desc: Rolling weekly log-return volatility.

features.name: w_range_pct
features.desc: Weekly range as a percentage of close.

features.name: w_vol_z
features.desc: Long-window volume z-score on weekly bars.

features.name: M_close
features.desc: Monthly close price; monthly bars are resampled from daily.

features.name: M_ret_1
features.desc: One-month return.

features.name: M_rsi14
features.desc: 14-period RSI on monthly close.

features.name: M_macd_hist
features.desc: MACD histogram on monthly close.

features.name: M_bb_pos
features.desc: Bollinger position on monthly close.

features.name: M_ma_ratio
features.desc: Fast/slow MA ratio on monthly close.

features.name: M_vol
features.desc: Rolling monthly log-return volatility.

features.name: M_range_pct
features.desc: Monthly range as a percentage of close.

features.name: M_vol_z
features.desc: Volume z-score on monthly bars (6-month lookback).

features.name: d_w180_slope
features.desc: OLS slope of close over the last 180 daily bars, normalised by mean. Long-term trend strength.

features.name: d_w180_cum_ret
features.desc: Cumulative return over the last 180 daily bars.

features.name: d_w180_dd
features.desc: Maximum drawdown observed in the last 180 daily bars (negative number).

features.name: w_w26_slope
features.desc: OLS slope of close over the last 26 weekly bars (≈6 months).

features.name: w_w26_cum_ret
features.desc: Cumulative return over 26 weeks.

features.name: w_w26_dd
features.desc: Maximum drawdown over 26 weeks.

features.name: M_w6_slope
features.desc: OLS slope of close over the last 6 monthly bars.

features.name: M_w6_cum_ret
features.desc: Cumulative return over 6 months.

features.name: M_w6_dd
features.desc: Maximum drawdown over 6 months.

features.name: m15_24h_ret
features.desc: Return over the last 24 hours computed from 15-minute bars (96 bars).

features.name: m15_24h_vol
features.desc: Standard deviation of log returns over the last 96 fifteen-minute bars (24h).

features.name: m15_24h_rsi
features.desc: 14-period RSI on the 15-minute series (last value).

features.name: m15_5d_vol
features.desc: Standard deviation of log returns over 5 days of 15-minute bars (480 bars).

features.name: m15_5d_dd
features.desc: Maximum drawdown observed in the last 5 days of 15-minute closes.

features.name: m15_24h_slope
features.desc: OLS slope of log close over the last 24 hours of 15-minute bars; positive = up-trending intraday.

features.name: sw_chop_er_5d
features.desc: 1 − Kaufman Efficiency Ratio over 5 days. ER = |net move| / sum |bar moves|. High value = sideways chop.

features.name: sw_chop_er_14d
features.desc: Same metric with N=14.

features.name: sw_chop_er_30d
features.desc: Same metric with N=30.

features.name: sw_chop_er_60d
features.desc: Same metric with N=60. Larger horizon detects long compressions.

features.name: sw_ratio_14d
features.desc: Fraction of last 14 days with |return| < 0.4 σ_{30} — volatility-adaptive 'sideways days' count.

features.name: sw_ratio_30d
features.desc: Same as sw_ratio_14d with a 30-day window.

features.name: sw_ci_14d
features.desc: Choppiness Index over 14 days. 100 = pure chop, 0 = pure trend.

features.name: sw_ci_30d
features.desc: Choppiness Index over 30 days.

features.name: sw_bb_width_20d
features.desc: Width of a 20-day, 2-σ Bollinger Band normalised by close — a compression indicator.

features.name: sw_range_pct_30d
features.desc: 30-day high-low range as a fraction of current close. Small = consolidating.

features.name: sw_streak_med
features.desc: Number of consecutive days (up to today) on which |return| was below 0.4 σ_{30}.

features.name: d_mvrv_z
features.desc: Price-based MVRV-Z proxy. True MVRV uses on-chain Realized Cap; we approximate Realized Price by a 365-day moving average. Positive = market value above 'realized', possibly overheated.

features.name: d_mvrv_z_chg7
features.desc: 7-day change in the MVRV-Z proxy. Captures regime turning points.

features.name: dxy_close_ret_1d
features.desc: 1-day return of the U.S. dollar index (ticker DX-Y.NYB on yfinance).

features.name: dxy_close_ret_5d
features.desc: 5-day return of DXY.

features.name: dxy_close_vol_20d
features.desc: 20-day rolling std of DXY log returns.

features.name: dxy_close_z_60d
features.desc: 60-day z-score of DXY.

features.name: gold_close_ret_1d
features.desc: 1-day return of front-month gold futures (GC=F).

features.name: gold_close_ret_5d
features.desc: 5-day return of gold.

features.name: gold_close_vol_20d
features.desc: 20-day vol of gold returns.

features.name: gold_close_z_60d
features.desc: 60-day z-score of gold price.

features.name: spx_close_ret_1d
features.desc: 1-day return of the S&P 500 index (^GSPC).

features.name: spx_close_ret_5d
features.desc: 5-day return of S&P 500.

features.name: spx_close_vol_20d
features.desc: 20-day vol of S&P 500.

features.name: spx_close_z_60d
features.desc: 60-day z-score of S&P 500.

features.name: vix_close_ret_1d
features.desc: 1-day return of CBOE Volatility Index (^VIX).

features.name: vix_close_ret_5d
features.desc: 5-day return of VIX.

features.name: vix_close_vol_20d
features.desc: 20-day vol of VIX returns.

features.name: vix_close_z_60d
features.desc: 60-day z-score of VIX level.

features.name: tnx_close_ret_1d
features.desc: 1-day change of 10-year U.S. Treasury yield (^TNX, in % × 10 on yfinance).

features.name: tnx_close_ret_5d
features.desc: 5-day change of 10Y yield.

features.name: tnx_close_vol_20d
features.desc: 20-day vol of 10Y yield log changes.

features.name: tnx_close_z_60d
features.desc: 60-day z-score of 10Y yield.

features.name: eth_close_ret_1d
features.desc: 1-day return of Ethereum (ETH-USD).

features.name: eth_close_ret_5d
features.desc: 5-day return of ETH.

features.name: eth_close_vol_20d
features.desc: 20-day vol of ETH returns.

features.name: eth_close_z_60d
features.desc: 60-day z-score of ETH.

features.name: eth_close
features.desc: Ethereum USD close price (used to derive the ETH/BTC ratio).

features.name: ethbtc_ratio
features.desc: ETH/BTC price ratio. Captures relative crypto-market rotation.

features.name: ethbtc_ret_5d
features.desc: 5-day return of ETH/BTC ratio.

features.name: funding_mean
features.desc: Daily mean of three 8-hour funding payments on Binance USDT-margined BTC perpetual.

features.name: funding_max
features.desc: Maximum 8-hour funding rate observed during the day.

features.name: funding_min
features.desc: Minimum 8-hour funding rate observed during the day.

features.name: funding_ma_7d
features.desc: 7-day moving average of funding_mean — smooths noisy intraday spikes.

features.name: funding_z_30d
features.desc: 30-day z-score of funding_mean. Extreme positive values often coincide with crowded long positioning.

features.name: basis
features.desc: Perpetual-vs-spot basis = (perp_close / spot_close) - 1, computed from daily mark-price klines.

features.name: basis_ma_5d
features.desc: 5-day MA of basis.

features.name: basis_z_30d
features.desc: 30-day z-score of basis.

features.name: fng
features.desc: Fear & Greed Index level (0 = extreme fear, 100 = extreme greed).

features.name: fng_ma_7d
features.desc: 7-day moving average of F&G.

features.name: fng_chg_3d
features.desc: 3-day change in F&G level. Captures abrupt sentiment shifts.

features.name: fng_extreme_low
features.desc: Indicator for FnG ≤ 25 (extreme fear regime).

features.name: fng_extreme_high
features.desc: Indicator for FnG ≥ 75 (extreme greed regime).

features.name: cal_dow
features.desc: Day of week (0 = Monday … 6 = Sunday). Captures weekly seasonality of crypto markets.

features.name: cal_month
features.desc: Month index (1–12).

features.name: cal_days_since_halving
features.desc: Days since the most recent BTC halving.

features.name: m2_chg_1d
features.desc: FRED M2 통화량 1일 변화율(보간된 일자 시리즈 기준).

features.name: m2_chg_1w
features.desc: M2 7일 변화율.

features.name: m2_chg_1m
features.desc: M2 30일 변화율.

features.name: m2_chg_3m
features.desc: M2 90일 변화율 — 분기 단위 통화 팽창/긴축 추세.

features.name: m2_z_24m
features.desc: M2 수준의 24개월 rolling z-score. 통화량 사이클 위치.

features.name: rho30_btc_spx
features.desc: BTC와 S&P500 일 로그수익률의 30일 rolling correlation. 위험자산 동조성.

features.name: rho30_btc_dxy
features.desc: BTC와 달러지수(DXY) 일 로그수익률의 30일 rolling correlation. 일반적으로 음의 상관.

features.name: rho30_btc_gold
features.desc: BTC와 금 일 로그수익률의 30일 rolling correlation. 안전자산 동조성 측정.

features.name: rho30_btc_eth
features.desc: BTC와 ETH 일 로그수익률의 30일 rolling correlation. 크립토 시장 결속도.

features.name: funding_skew_7d
features.desc: (funding_max - funding_min)의 7일 평균. 일중 펀딩 스큐의 추세.

features.name: funding_velocity
features.desc: 펀딩 평균값의 7일 변화량을 30일 변동성으로 정규화 — 펀딩 모멘텀 z-score.

features.name: hashrate_ribbon
features.desc: 30일 vs 60일 hash rate MA의 비율. 채굴자 항복/회복 신호. 음수면 단기 hash rate가 장기보다 낮음.

features.name: hashrate_chg_7d
features.desc: Hash rate 7일 변화율. 네트워크 보안/채굴 인센티브 변화.

features.name: adr_chg_7d
features.desc: Active address 수 7일 변화율 — 네트워크 사용량 모멘텀.

features.name: tx_per_adr
features.desc: 주소당 평균 트랜잭션 수 — 네트워크 활동 강도/효율.

features.name: mvrv2_z_200w
features.desc: 200주(1400일) MA 기준 z-score — Mayer-Multiple 스타일 장기 밸류에이션 마커.

features.name: mvrv2_z_ema900
features.desc: Half-life 900일 EMA 기준 z-score — UTXO 에이징 근사 (실현가격 프록시).

features.name: mvrv2_z_multi
features.desc: MA90/365/1000/1500을 가중 블렌드한 multi-cohort 실현가격 근사의 365일 z-score.

features.name: mvrv2_mayer
features.desc: Mayer Multiple — 단기 밸류에이션 (가격/200일MA - 1). 양수면 평균 위, 음수면 평균 아래.

features.name: mvrv2_nvt_z
features.desc: NVT-like 비율의 180일 z-score — 시가총액 / 활동주소 활동량 (Network Value to Transactions 근사).

features.name: mvrv2_hashrate_z
features.desc: Hash rate 30일 z-score — 채굴자 활동의 단기 이상치.

features.name: vol_of_vol_30d
features.desc: Vol-of-vol — 14일 일변동성의 30일 표준편차. 변동성 자체의 변동성.

features.name: vol_regime_z
features.desc: 현재 14일 변동성을 365일 평균/표준편차로 정규화한 변동성 레짐 z-score.
